faqData.question: Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: We regret that we are unable to accommodate plus ones due to limited seating. Each seat has been reserved for those on our guest list. We hope you understand.

faqData.question: Can I bring kids?
faqData.answer: We kindly ask that this be an adults-only celebration. We are unable to accommodate children at the venue, with the exception of those in our entourage. We hope you understand and look forward to celebrating with you.

faqData.question: Is there a dress code?
faqData.answer: Yes. Guests are encouraged to wear Light Blue or Light Pink attire to match the wedding motif.
